message:
test: add xychart_comprehensive golden case + FM_GOLDEN_CASE filter

- Add xychart_comprehensive test case covering category padding edge case
- Add FM_GOLDEN_CASE env var to run single test case (e.g., FM_GOLDEN_CASE=flowchart_simple)
- Use selected_case_ids() helper to support filtered test runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+xychart-beta
+  title "Quarterly Revenue"
+  x-axis [Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4]
+  y-axis "Revenue (USD)" 0 --> 120
+  bar Sales [30, 60, 95, 45]
+  bar Expenses [20, 40, 55, 35]
+  line Target [50, 70, 100, 80]
